nodes.name: explain.slt
nodes.summary: E2e test for EXPLAIN command output format and query plan presentation in batch mode.

nodes.name: abs.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ABS (absolute value) function with various numeric types.

nodes.summary: Comprehensive partial SLT test for array concatenation functions and operators in batch mode.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ARRAY_MIN function returning the minimum element in an array.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for array predicate functions like ARRAY_CONTAINS and membership checks.

nodes.name: array_reverse.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ARRAY_REVERSE function reversing array element order.

nodes.name: array_sort.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ARRAY_SORT function with various sort orders.

nodes.name: array_sum.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ARRAY_SUM function summing numeric array elements.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for ARRAY_TRANSFORM function applying lambdas to array elements.

nodes.name: at_time_zone.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for AT TIME ZONE temporal conversion operator.

nodes.name: bytea_bits.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for bytea binary manipulation functions and bit operations.

nodes.name: cast.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for CAST expressions and implicit type coercions in batch mode.

nodes.name: concat.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for CONCAT and CONCAT_WS string concatenation functions.

nodes.name: crc.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for CRC32 and hash functions in batch mode.

nodes.name: date_bin.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for DATE_BIN function binning timestamps into intervals.

nodes.name: date_trunc.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for DATE_TRUNC function truncating timestamps to specified precision.

nodes.name: encdec.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for encoding/decoding functions like BASE64 and HEX.

nodes.name: format_type.slt.part
nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for FORMAT_TYPE function returning type name as string.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for gamma and related mathematical functions.

nodes.summary: Partial SLT test for GREATEST and LEAST variadic comparison functions.
